title: Spencer Pratt Wants to Be Mayor. His Fans Want Him to Be Batman.
description: What an A.I.-generated video of the former reality TV star teaches us about the future of political ads.
author: Willy Staley

title: Teachers Union Urges Schools to Curb A.I. Chatbots and Screen Time
description: The American Federation of Teachers recommended “no screens” at all for those in second grade or younger, and no A.I. chatbots for students in elementary school.
author: Natasha Singer

title: Go Ask Alice Why Tech Start-Ups Are Spending Big on Hype Videos
description: A Mad Hatter and a giant rabbit sit around a table discussing an A.I. start-up. This is normal behavior around the Bay Area these days.
author: Natallie Rocha and Mike Kai Chen

title: At the A.I. Epicenter, Technologists Dismiss Pope Leo’s Warnings About the New Technology
description: Pope Leo XIV’s spiritual message on artificial intelligence arrived as Silicon Valley’s A.I. enthusiasts pursue their own spirituality through technology.
author: Cade Metz

title: SpaceX IPO Filing Reveals Favorable Terms for Elon Musk
description: The ways it set up its board and Mr. Musk’s pay appear to benefit him at the expense of other shareholders, corporate governance experts said.
author: Ryan Mac

title: ‘The Maids,’ With Yerin Ha, Asks: Has Life Become One Big Performance?
description: In his rethinking of Jean Genet’s classic work about class and power, Kip Williams ponders “a world that gives you every opportunity not to be yourself.”
author: Roslyn Sulcas

title: Massachusetts Uber and Lyft Drivers Form First Union for Ride-Share Workers
description: The App Drivers Union said it was the first organization in the country to be formally certified to represent drivers for apps such as Uber and Lyft.
author: Amanda Holpuch

title: As A.I. Fever Rises in Silicon Valley, Pope Leo Has a Few Words
description: The American pope wants to take artificial intelligence down a notch. Is he challenging the tech companies, or will tech take over the papacy?
author: David Streitfeld

title: One Job That Is Growing in the A.I. Era? Cybersecurity Experts.
description: Demand for security engineers has surged as artificial intelligence generates a glut of new code and models like Anthropic’s Mythos create new concerns.
author: Kate Conger

title: UK Institute Is Hunting for Dangers Lurking in AI
description: The government’s A.I. Security Institute, staffed by alumni from OpenAI and Google, is becoming a model for countries grappling with A.I.’s emerging risks.
author: Adam Satariano and Paul Mozur

title: Samsung Averts a Walkout With Big Bonuses, but Discord Over A.I. Profits Brews
description: Samsung Electronics, a global memory chip supplier, has been a major beneficiary of the A.I boom. It has also become the center of a debate over how to divide its spoils.
author: Max Kim

title: Musk’s SpaceX Reveals Its Finances for the First Time as It Readies for IPO
description: Mr. Musk’s rocket and satellite maker disclosed its financial performance as it prepares to go public in what is set to be one of the largest offerings to date.
author: Ryan Mac and Lauren Hirsch

title: Soundtrack to 8,000 Job Cuts: A Meta Worker’s Layoff-Themed A.I. Songs
description: On a dark day of layoffs at Meta, one employee responded by creating an internal radio station that plays songs about job cuts — generated by artificial intelligence, of course.
author: Mike Isaac

title: Meta Lays Off 8,000 Employees, as A.I. Casualties Mount
description: Employees have signed petitions against being tracked by A.I. and were trying to figure out who had been let go on Wednesday, as the Silicon Valley giant tries to transform into an A.I.-first company.
author: Eli Tan, Kalley Huang and Mike Isaac

title: Tesla’s Semi Truck could Jolt the Trucking Industry
description: California truckers have expressed strong interest in the Tesla Semi because it costs much less and can travel further on a charge than electric trucks sold by established manufacturers.
author: Jack Ewing and Gabriela Bhaskar

title: How Google Is Starting to Win the A.I. Race
description: Despite its early stumbles, Google’s Gemini has leapfrogged ChatGPT in relevance and usefulness. Soon, it will be ubiquitous.
author: Brian X. Chen

title: Bipartisan Bill Would Impose New Annual Fee on Electric Vehicles
description: A House transportation bill introduced this week would require owners of electric cars to pay $130 to cover the cost of road repairs.
author: Jack Ewing

title: Senate Republicans Introduce Funding Measure to Combat Online Child Abuse
description: As part of the reconciliation bill, the senators have allocated $108 million over three years to add nearly 200 specialists at the Department of Homeland Security.
author: Cecilia Kang

title: Rising Energy Costs and Data Centers at Heart of NextEra’s Dominion Bid
description: NextEra’s proposed acquisition of Dominion Energy comes as Americans are paying a lot more for electricity, and data centers are demanding a lot more power from utilities.
author: Ivan Penn

title: As OpenAI Celebrates Court Win Against Musk, Other Challenges Lie Ahead
description: A jury’s rejection of Elon Musk’s $150 billion lawsuit against OpenAI was a major hurdle crossed. But the maker of ChatGPT faces a list of other problems.
author: Cade Metz and Natallie Rocha
